landing.badge: Learn like a system, not a list
landing.subtitle: Upload your notes and get an interactive concept tree. Unlock nodes by passing tests and discover exactly what you know and what you need to review.
landing.featuresSubtitle: An active learning system that shows you the path and keeps you going.
landing.feature1Desc: Your notes become a tree of connected concepts with a logical learning order.
landing.feature2Desc: Each node includes a mini test. Answer, get feedback, and unlock new topics.
landing.feature3Desc: Each concept shows your level: to learn, in progress, or mastered. No self-deception.
landing.feature4Desc: Study streak, mastery percentage, and coach messages to keep you on track.
landing.step1Desc: Drag a PDF or paste your text.
landing.step2Desc: We detect concepts and connect them.
landing.step3Desc: Pass tests and advance through the tree.
landing.ctaSectionDesc: Upload your notes and build your first knowledge map in seconds.
landing.footer: Study Map · Your personal academic coach

upload.title: Upload your notes
upload.subtitle: Drag a PDF or paste your text. We'll build your knowledge map.
upload.textareaPlaceholder: Paste your biology, history, programming notes here…
upload.aiNotice: We analyze your notes with AI to create a personalized map.

login.sentLink: We've sent a sign-in link to
login.spamHint: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a magic link or use Google.
login.errorSend: Failed to send the link. Please try again.

skillTree.graphAria: Knowledge map. Drag to pan, scroll to zoom.
skillTree.dragHint: Drag to pan · scroll to zoom

lesson.exitDesc: Progress for this node will be lost. You can try again later.

dashboard.noMapDesc: Select an itinerary or create a new one to see your progress.
dashboard.coachHigh: You're on fire! Almost the entire map is mastered.
dashboard.coachMid: Good pace. Strengthen weak nodes to level up.
dashboard.coachLow: You've just started. Unlock nodes by completing lessons.

dashboardPage.title: Dashboard
dashboardPage.subtitle: Your study maps and overall progress.
dashboardPage.emptyDesc: Create your first study map from the upload page.
dashboardPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this itinerary? This action cannot be undone.

itinerary.deleteConfirm: Delete this itinerary? This action cannot be undone.
itinerary.title: My itineraries
itinerary.emptyDesc: Create your first study map from the home page.
itinerary.footerHint: Click a map to open it

onboarding.step1Text: Turn your notes into an interactive knowledge tree.
onboarding.step2Text: Paste text or upload a file to generate a concept map.
onboarding.step3Text: Each node has a lesson with theory and questions to assess your understanding.
onboarding.step4Text: Colors show your mastery: green (high), amber (medium), red (low).

red.label: To learn
red.coach: Start here, you don't master it yet.

amber.label: In progress
amber.coach: Good, but you can improve. Repeat the lesson.
